title: Actions and Activities Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To talk about something with other people.
choices: discuss
listen
offer
rounds.answer: discuss
rounds.explanation: discuss: To talk about something with other people.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To finish something or make it whole.
choices: discuss
listen
complete
rounds.answer: complete
rounds.explanation: complete: To finish something or make it whole.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To go from one place to another, often far away.
choices: listen
travel
discuss
rounds.answer: travel
rounds.explanation: travel: To go from one place to another, often far away.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

rounds.answer: listen

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To take something away from a place.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To get away from a place or a situation.
rounds.answer: escape

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Think of something you did yesterday or last week.
Then it ran to the garden and ______.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.
